title: Borderlands Mobile Surprise Launch
details: Take-Two Interactive has shadow-dropped 'Borderlands Mobile' on iOS—a brand new title developed from the ground up by Zynga.
This is a standalone experience built specifically for smartphones, featuring a story campaign, classic loot mechanics, and boss battles adapted for short sessions.
Progress your character and upgrade your hub ship to unlock new rewards and opportunities across the wasteland.
PSA: While currently exclusive to iOS, Android support pages are already live, hinting at a global expansion coming soon.
